text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Winning Ticket has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Maaan, isn't there anything fun to do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We've made it past the big rush of the Twinkle
Series, so I wanna go somewhere fun!
choice_data_list: And I did promise we'd go to that hot spring.
And I did promise we'd go to that hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still remember her joy when she pulled the grand
prize in the New Year's raffle.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeeaaah! Hot spring, hot spring, hot
SPRIIING!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How could I forget about it? That was a HUGE
promise we made!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! I'm so sorry, Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't stay calm now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
While we're just standing here, the hot springs are
waiting for us!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh! Hang on just a little longer, hot spring!
We'll be right there!
choice_data_list: A-at least let me get ready!
A-at least let me get ready!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hurriedly gathering my things, I head out to
the hot spring with Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! A real-life traditional inn. This is
authentic stuff!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, look at us, how far we've finally come... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as we arrive, Winning Ticket starts
sobbing. Once I manage to calm her down, we
make our way to the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaiit a minute!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Are you kidding, Trainer? There's one thing we gotta do before bathing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! When you think of stuff to do at a hot
spring inn—it's gotta be table tennis!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! One Tickezo all-out explosive smash,
COMING UP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Winning Ticket and I work up a healthy sweat
over an intense table tennis match.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! This hot spring is the BEST!
choice_data_list:
I know, I know. Remember, we can't be too
loud.

I know, I know. Remember, we can't be too
loud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I bring some drinks to try to calm her down, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I-is that... the legendary post-bath coffee milk?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOHOOO! I'm gonna drink it in one biiig gulp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, my efforts just seem to make her even
more excited.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yum! That really hit the spot after a good soak!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Table tennis, the hot spring, the coffee
milk... This is all I've ever wanted!
choice_data_list: And we still have a big dinner coming.
And we still have a big dinner coming.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
A bounty of the seas and the mountains! We got
the complete set!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm so glad... I've worked so hard up to now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our luxurious dinner, Ticket stops by my
room.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, I'm so full!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The food was sooo good—I lost track of how
many bowls I ate!
choice_data_list: I'm glad we decided to come here.
I'm glad we decided to come here.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, just like how I'll never forget about the
Twinkle Series, I'll never forget about today
either!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I went full blast both in those races and in
enjoying the hot springs today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaahhhh! Everything was sooo fun! I'll... I'll
always remember this daaay!
choice_data_list:
Then let's keep winning races and have even
more memorable days.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aww, Trainer! You took the words right outta my
mouth!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! We're not done yet—let's keep
the challenges coming!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run more exciting races! And then we can
come to the hot springs again!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaah! I'm with you all the way, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: One, two, GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Winning Ticket and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
